'''Kukul''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on [[Odnalor Chull]] for stealing [[Starship/Legends|starships]] from the [[Guarja Shipyards]] on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]]. He also offered [[Currency/Legends|money]] for several other criminals for their wrongdoings against him.

{{Char-stub}}
